name: Suzhou UIGreen Micro&Nano Technologies Co.,Ltd
summary: Suzhou UIGreen Micro&Nano Technologies Co.,Ltd is a China-based company that develops and manufactures micro- and nano-scale materials and devices. The company's products are used in a wide range of applications, including electronics, energy, and biomedicine. Suzhou UIGreen Micro&Nano Technologies Co.,Ltd is headquartered in China.
